zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Reinold I von Dassel於1090年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特時，他的父親Dietrich von Dassel36歲，母親Kunihild N.N.29歲。他於大約1113年與Mathilde von Schauenburg結婚。他去世於1167年在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可達瑟爾享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Reinold I von Dassel于1090年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特时，他的父亲Dietrich von Dassel36岁，母亲Kunihild N.N.29岁。他于大约1113年与Mathilde von Schauenburg结婚。他去世于1167年在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可達瑟爾享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Dassel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vassell
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): of Norman origin, a status name from Old French vassel ‘vassal, servant, dependent’ (from Late Latin vazallus), used for a retainer who was under the protection of a king or powerful lord.

nameMeanings.name: Reinold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Reinold I von Dassel was born in 1090, in Höxter, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Dietrich von Dassel, was 36 and his mother, Kunihild N.N., was 29. He married Mathilde von Schauenburg about 1113. He died in 1167, in Dassel, Einbeck, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Reinold I von Dassel est né en 1090, à Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Dietrich von Dassel, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Kunihild N.N., avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Schauenburg environ 1113. Il est décédé en 1167, à Dassel, Einbeck, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 77 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Reinold I von Dassel(이)가 1090년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 ho스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dietrich von Dassel(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunihild N.N.(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1113년 Mathilde von Schauenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1167년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 아이벡 다셀에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Reinold I von Dassel родился в 1090 г. в местности крис хoкстир, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Dietrich von Dassel было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunihild N.N., 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Schauenburg около 1113 г. Он умер в 1167 г. в местности дассел, эинбекк, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 77 лет.
